task_completion.description: Verify that a new badge template is opened or created in Jolly Lobby Track.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Jolly Lobby Track application running with a new or blank badge design canvas visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the badge orientation is set to Portrait.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the badge canvas appearing vertically oriented (taller than it is wide) or a page setup/layout menu showing 'Portrait' selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Visitor Name' field is included on the badge.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text element, database field, or placeholder on the badge canvas that explicitly reads 'Visitor Name'.

task_completion.description: Verify the template is being named 'Vertical_Standard'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Vertical_Standard' entered into a 'Save As' dialog box, filename field, or template properties panel.
Look for the agent clicking a 'Save' button, a save confirmation dialog, or the file 'Vertical_Standard' appearing in the saved templates list or file explorer.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Jolly Lobby Track GUI to create the badge.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Jolly Lobby Track interface (menus, canvas, dialogs) rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Jolly Lobby Track application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window must clearly belong to Jolly Lobby Track (check window titles, specific UI elements, and branding), not a generic image editor or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually designed the badge rather than just renaming an existing file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for intermediate steps showing the badge canvas being actively edited, fields being placed, or layout settings being changed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target filename for the badge template must be exactly 'Vertical_Standard'. The required orientation for the badge must be 'Portrait' (the canvas should be taller than it is wide).
